JazzCash.instructions: Open JazzCash app or dial *786# → Send Money → enter the number below → enter the exact fee amount → complete the transaction, then take a screenshot.

Bank Transfer.instructions: Transfer the exact fee amount using the account number or IBAN below via your banking app, then take a screenshot of the transaction.

Payoneer.instructions: Contact us on WhatsApp to receive Payoneer payment details for this job.

text.welcomeSubtext: Enter the code provided by your recruiter to view job details and start your registration.
text.invalidCodeMessage: We couldn't find that job code. Please double-check it and try again.
text.successSubtext: Your details have been recorded. Please complete the payment below to finish the process.
text.paymentInstructions: Click the button above to pay via the provider shown. After payment, keep your reference number safe — you will need it for follow-up.
text.finalSubtext: Send your registration for confirmation, and keep a copy for your records.
text.payPageSubtext: Send the exact registration fee using the details below, then return and confirm on WhatsApp.
text.iHavePaidButton: I've Paid — Send Confirmation on WhatsApp
